{
  DocActivator.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class DocActivatorRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register() =>
    GeneratedActivators.Register<global::Doc>(Create);

  static global::Doc Create(IReadOnlyDictionary<string, object?> values)
  {
    values.TryGetValue("Name", out var arg0);
    values.TryGetValue("Perms", out var arg1);
    return new global::Doc((string)arg0!, (global::Permissions)arg1!);
  }
},
  DocRowReader.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
file static class DocRowReaderRegistration
{
  [ModuleInitializer]
  internal static void Register() =>
    GeneratedRowReaders.Register<global::Doc>(ReadRow);

  static global::Doc ReadRow(global::DocumentFormat.OpenXml.Spreadsheet.Cell?[] cells, string?[]? sharedStrings, global::System.Action<int, string> onError)
  {
    return new global::Doc(global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadString(cells[0], sharedStrings), global::Excelsior.ExcelsiorReaders.ReadEnum<global::Permissions>(cells[1], sharedStrings, 1, onError));
  }
},
  DocSheetBuilderExtensions.g.cs:
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable
namespace Excelsior;
using System;
public static class DocSheetBuilderExtensions
{
  public static ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> NameColumn(
    this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder,
    Action<ColumnConfig<global::Doc, string>> configuration)
    => builder.Column(_ => _.Name, configuration);

  public static void NameHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, string value)
    => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Order(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Width(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
    => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Doc, string> value)
    => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, string value)
    => builder.Format(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, string value)
    => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder)
    => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Name);

  public static void NameRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Func<global::Doc, string, string?> value)
    => builder.Render(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Func<global::Doc, FormulaContext<global::Doc>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Doc>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder)
    => builder.Filter(_ => _.Name);

  public static void NameInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, bool value)
    => builder.Include(_ => _.Name, value);

  public static void NameExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder)
    => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Name);

  public static ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> PermsColumn(
    this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder,
    Action<ColumnConfig<global::Doc, global::Permissions>> configuration)
    => builder.Column(_ => _.Perms, configuration);

  public static void PermsHeadingText(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, string value)
    => builder.HeadingText(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsOrder(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Order(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, int? value)
    => builder.Width(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsMinWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MinWidth(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsMaxWidth(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, int? value)
    => builder.MaxWidth(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsHeadingStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle> value)
    => builder.HeadingStyle(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsCellStyle(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Action<Excelsior.CellStyle, global::Doc, global::Permissions> value)
    => builder.CellStyle(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsFormat(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, string value)
    => builder.Format(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsNullDisplay(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, string value)
    => builder.NullDisplay(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsIsHtml(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder)
    => builder.IsHtml(_ => _.Perms);

  public static void PermsRender(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Func<global::Doc, global::Permissions, string?> value)
    => builder.Render(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Func<global::Doc, FormulaContext<global::Doc>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsFormula(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, Func<FormulaContext<global::Doc>, string> value)
    => builder.Formula(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsFilter(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder)
    => builder.Filter(_ => _.Perms);

  public static void PermsInclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder, bool value)
    => builder.Include(_ => _.Perms, value);

  public static void PermsExclude(this ISheetBuilder<global::Doc> builder)
    => builder.Exclude(_ => _.Perms);
}

}
